requirement_topic.en: ANOR / NC Standards — EMC Emissions (Radiated and Conducted)
requirement_topic.zh: ANOR / NC标准——电磁兼容辐射与传导发射
requirement_topic.zht: ANOR / NC標準——電磁相容輻射與傳導發射

summary.en: Cameroon's Agence des Normes et de la Qualité (ANOR) publishes national NC standards that are generally aligned with international IEC/CISPR standards (including IEC/CISPR 32 for multimedia equipment emissions and IEC/CISPR 35 for immunity). EMC compliance evidence consistent with ANOR/NC standards is required for telecom and electronic equipment. ART may require EMC test reports as part of the homologation submission. ANOR conformity marks may be required depending on product category. CE marking and Chinese GB 9254 / GB/T 17625 compliance are not directly recognised as equivalent by ANOR.
summary.zh: 喀麦隆标准与质量局（ANOR）发布与国际IEC/CISPR标准总体接轨的国家NC标准（包括多媒体设备发射的IEC/CISPR 32及抗扰度的IEC/CISPR 35）。电信和电子设备须提供符合ANOR/NC标准的电磁兼容合规证明。ART可能在同质化申请中要求提交EMC测试报告。视产品类别而定，可能需要ANOR符合性标志。ANOR不直接承认CE标志及中国GB 9254 / GB/T 17625合规作为等效认可。
summary.zht: 喀麥隆標準與質量局（ANOR）發布與國際IEC/CISPR標準總體接軌的國家NC標準（包括多媒體設備發射的IEC/CISPR 32及抗擾度的IEC/CISPR 35）。電信和電子設備須提供符合ANOR/NC標準的電磁相容合規證明。ART可能在同質化申請中要求提交EMC測試報告。視產品類別而定，可能需要ANOR符合性標誌。ANOR不直接承認CE標誌及中國GB 9254 / GB/T 17625合規作為等效認可。

standards_or_laws: Loi n°2010/013 du 21 décembre 2010 (ART homologation scope includes EMC)

summary.en: Chinese electronic and wireless devices are subject to GB/T 9254 (Class A/B conducted and radiated emissions) and GB/T 17625 (harmonic current and voltage fluctuations) under CCC or voluntary compliance. SRRC type approval test reports also cover radiated emissions from intentional radiators. Chinese GB standards are CISPR-aligned but are not directly recognised by ANOR Cameroon.
summary.zh: 中国电子及无线设备须符合CCC或自愿合规框架下的GB/T 9254（A/B类传导和辐射发射）及GB/T 17625（谐波电流和电压波动）。SRRC型式核准测试报告同样涵盖有意辐射体的辐射发射。中国GB标准与CISPR接轨，但不被喀麦隆ANOR直接承认。
summary.zht: 中國電子及無線設備須符合CCC或自願合規框架下的GB/T 9254（A/B類傳導和輻射發射）及GB/T 17625（諧波電流和電壓波動）。SRRC型式核准測試報告同樣涵蓋有意輻射體的輻射發射。中國GB標準與CISPR接軌，但不被喀麥隆ANOR直接承認。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 9254 (Class A/B radiated and conducted emissions, China)
SRRC type approval test reports (radiated emissions from intentional radiators)

gap.en: Partial gap: Chinese GB/T 9254 and GB/T 17625 standards are CISPR-aligned and test data may be reusable in an ANOR/NC submission, but equivalence is not formally recognised. Dedicated ANOR/NC-referenced test reports (from an accredited laboratory) are recommended for ART homologation submissions. ANOR conformity assessment procedures and mark requirements should be verified for the specific product category.
gap.zh: 部分差距：中国GB/T 9254和GB/T 17625标准与CISPR接轨，测试数据或可在ANOR/NC提交中复用，但等效性未获正式承认。建议在ART同质化申请中提供经认可实验室出具的ANOR/NC标准参考测试报告。应针对具体产品类别核实ANOR符合性评估程序及标志要求。
gap.zht: 部分差距：中國GB/T 9254和GB/T 17625標準與CISPR接軌，測試數據或可在ANOR/NC提交中複用，但等效性未獲正式承認。建議在ART同質化申請中提供經認可實驗室出具的ANOR/NC標準參考測試報告。應針對具體產品類別核實ANOR符合性評估程序及標誌要求。

source.publisher: ANOR — Agence des Normes et de la Qualité (Cameroun)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chinese GB/T 9254 / GB/T 17625 EMC test data may provide a starting point but ANOR/NC-referenced test reports are recommended for ART homologation. Formal ANOR equivalence recognition does not exist. Engage a local regulatory consultant to confirm current ANOR NC standard references and conformity assessment pathways for the specific product category.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 中国GB/T 9254 / GB/T 17625 EMC测试数据可作为起点，但建议为ART同质化认证提供ANOR/NC标准参考测试报告。ANOR正式等效承认机制不存在。建议委托当地监管顾问确认特定产品类别的现行ANOR NC标准引用及符合性评估路径。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 中國GB/T 9254 / GB/T 17625 EMC測試數據可作為起點，但建議為ART同質化認證提供ANOR/NC標準參考測試報告。ANOR正式等效承認機制不存在。建議委託當地監管顧問確認特定產品類別的現行ANOR NC標準引用及符合性評估路徑。

requirement_topic.zh: ANOR / NC标准——电磁兼容抗扰度
requirement_topic.zht: ANOR / NC標準——電磁相容抗擾度

summary.en: EMC immunity requirements for electronic and telecom equipment in Cameroon follow ANOR national standards aligned with IEC/CISPR 35 and IEC 61000-series standards. Immunity test evidence (ESD, radiated immunity, EFT/burst, surge) may be required as part of the ART homologation technical dossier. ANOR does not formally recognise CE marking EN 55035 / EN 61000-series test reports as substitutes, although IEC-aligned test data from accredited laboratories may be accepted at ART's discretion.
summary.zh: 喀麦隆电子及电信设备的电磁兼容抗扰度要求遵循与IEC/CISPR 35及IEC 61000系列标准接轨的ANOR国家标准。ART同质化技术文件中可能需要提供抗扰度测试证明（静电放电、辐射抗扰度、电快速瞬变/脉冲群、浪涌）。ANOR不正式承认CE标志EN 55035 / EN 61000系列测试报告作为替代，但ART可酌情接受经认可实验室出具的IEC接轨测试数据。
summary.zht: 喀麥隆電子及電信設備的電磁相容抗擾度要求遵循與IEC/CISPR 35及IEC 61000系列標準接軌的ANOR國家標準。ART同質化技術文件中可能需要提供抗擾度測試證明（靜電放電、輻射抗擾度、電快速瞬變/脈衝群、浪涌）。ANOR不正式承認CE標誌EN 55035 / EN 61000系列測試報告作為替代，但ART可酌情接受經認可實驗室出具的IEC接軌測試數據。

standards_or_laws: IEC 61000-4 series (ESD, radiated, EFT, surge) — ANOR reference

summary.en: Chinese devices may have IEC 61000-series immunity testing conducted as part of CCC or voluntary compliance. GB/T 17626 series mirrors IEC 61000-4 immunity standards. Test reports from CNAS-accredited laboratories are internationally respected but not automatically accepted by ANOR Cameroon.
summary.zh: 中国设备可能在CCC或自愿合规框架下进行了IEC 61000系列抗扰度测试。GB/T 17626系列与IEC 61000-4抗扰度标准对应。CNAS认可实验室出具的测试报告在国际上具有信誉，但不被喀麦隆ANOR自动接受。
summary.zht: 中國設備可能在CCC或自願合規框架下進行了IEC 61000系列抗擾度測試。GB/T 17626系列與IEC 61000-4抗擾度標準對應。CNAS認可實驗室出具的測試報告在國際上具有信譽，但不被喀麥隆ANOR自動接受。

gap.en: Partial gap: Chinese GB/T 17626 immunity test data is IEC 61000-4-aligned and may be leveraged in the ART homologation dossier, but no formal recognition mechanism exists. Accredited laboratory reports citing IEC standards directly are preferred. Verify with ART which immunity standards are explicitly required for the specific device category.
gap.zh: 部分差距：中国GB/T 17626抗扰度测试数据与IEC 61000-4接轨，可在ART同质化文件中加以利用，但不存在正式承认机制。优先采用直接引用IEC标准的认可实验室报告。须向ART核实特定设备类别明确要求的抗扰度标准。
gap.zht: 部分差距：中國GB/T 17626抗擾度測試數據與IEC 61000-4接軌，可在ART同質化文件中加以利用，但不存在正式承認機制。優先採用直接引用IEC標準的認可實驗室報告。須向ART核實特定設備類別明確要求的抗擾度標準。

source.publisher: ANOR — Agence des Normes et de la Qualité (Cameroun)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] IEC 61000-series-aligned immunity test reports from accredited laboratories are the recommended basis for the ART homologation technical dossier in Cameroon. Chinese GB/T 17626 data may be usable but confirm acceptance with ART or a local regulatory consultant before relying on it.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 经认可实验室出具的IEC 61000系列接轨抗扰度测试报告是喀麦隆ART同质化技术文件的推荐依据。中国GB/T 17626数据或可使用，但在依赖该数据前须向ART或当地监管顾问确认其可接受性。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 經認可實驗室出具的IEC 61000系列接軌抗擾度測試報告是喀麥隆ART同質化技術文件的推薦依據。中國GB/T 17626數據或可使用，但在依賴該數據前須向ART或當地監管顧問確認其可接受性。
